channel.title: Azure Migration Monitor
channel.description: Azure storage migration queries from Reddit, Stack Overflow, and community forums with suggested responses.

item.title: Reddit r/azure: Private Preview: Azure Storage Mover now supports private data transfers from AWS S3
item.description:
Source: Reddit r/azure
Question: Private Preview: Azure Storage Mover now supports private data transfers from AWS S3
Microsoft just announced that this feature is now in private preview. Last year, they announced Storage Mover for AWS to Azure, but it was missing private network support, and now it has it!
item.content:encoded:
Great news for Azure Storage Mover users! The addition of private network support via Azure Private Link means data transfers from AWS S3 to Azure now stay on Microsoft's private backbone.
Key steps to get started: 1. Set up Azure Storage Mover: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/storage-mover/ 2. Enable Private Endpoint for Azure Storage: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/private-link/private-endpoint-overview 3. Plan for TLS 1.2 compliance: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/storage/common/transport-layer-security-configure-migrate-to-tls2
This is a significant step for secure cross-cloud migrations.

item.title: Reddit r/azure: Azure Data Box new devices review
item.description:
Source: Reddit r/azure
Question: Azure Data Box new devices review
Has anyone here used the Azure databox new devices? How is the 120 and 525TB capacity copy speeds? what usecases did you guys use it for? I want to migrate to managed disk, is that an option?
item.content:encoded:
Here are Azure tools that can help with your migration:
**Azure Data Box** - For large offline migrations (tens of TBs+). Microsoft ships a physical device to your site. Docs: https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/databox/
**Azure Storage Mover** - Fully managed migration service with agent-based orchestration. Docs: https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/storage-mover/
**AzCopy** - Versatile CLI tool for Azure Storage data movement. Docs: https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/storage/common/storage-use-azcopy-v10
Full migration guide: https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/storage/common/storage-migration-overview
